title: Urostigma holosericeum

The genus Urostigma is now considered a synonym for the genus Arecas and the species is now known as Arecas holosericeum. Further research may lead to more accurate classification. The sap of the plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory properties and is used to treat wounds and skin conditions. Further research is needed to confirm the efficacy and safety of these medicinal uses.
